name: Quantex Capital Corporation
summary: Quantex Capital Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in manufacturing and distributing power supply products for commercial, industrial, and consumer use worldwide. It offers inverters, converters, regulators, and battery chargers, as well as transformer-based power supplies and switch mode power supplies primarily through major power supply distributors. The company also provides customized power supply solutions to original equipment manufacturer and original design manufacturer customers. The company was founded in 1998. It was formerly known as Beddis International, Ltd. and changed its name to Linksxpress.com, Inc. in 2001; to Beddis International, Ltd. in 2003; and then to Quantex Capital Corporation in 2005. The company is based in Delta, Canada. Quantex Capital Corporation is a subsidiary of Maxxcap Corporation.
